name: visio-diagram
description: Generate editable Microsoft Visio diagrams and paper-style method figures from text descriptions using script-only Visio COM automation.

interface.shortDescription: Create editable Visio .vsdx diagrams and paper figures.
interface.longDescription: Visio Diagram helps Codex convert architecture, network, topology, flow, process, and paper method figure descriptions into editable Microsoft Visio .vsdx files by generating a JSON diagram specification and running a bundled PowerShell script against Visio's COM automation API. It includes paper-oriented primitives such as panels, tables, lists, trees, icons, cylinders, bar charts, line charts, and routed connectors. It is a script-only workflow and does not rely on desktop UI automation.
interface.defaultPrompt: Create an editable Visio .vsdx diagram or paper-style method figure from my description.
